title: Markdown Render Flow
interaction_flow: Caller → buildSubPageData(rootDir): gather skills, knownSkillIds, tutorials
buildSubPageData → readSourceFiles(rootDir): returns { skills: rawSkills }
buildSubPageData → knownSkillIds = new Set(skills.map(s => s.id)): build Set<string> of all skill IDs
buildSubPageData → Caller: return { skills, knownSkillIds, skillsByCategory, rules, tutorials }
--- Skill body pre-processing (transformers/factory.js or shared.js) ---
Caller → replacePlaceholders(skill.body, provider, commandNames, allSkillNames): substitute {{model}}, {{config_file}}, {{ask_instruction}}, {{command_prefix}}, {{available_commands}} tokens
replacePlaceholders → PROVIDER_PLACEHOLDERS[provider]: lookup provider-specific values
replacePlaceholders → result.replace(regex, cmdPrefix): swap '/' invocations when cmdPrefix != '/'
replacePlaceholders → Caller: return substituted skillBody string
Caller → prefixSkillReferences(skillBody, prefix, allSkillNames, commandPrefix): add name prefix to /skillname and 'the X skill' references
prefixSkillReferences → sorted skillNames (desc length): avoid partial-match collisions
prefixSkillReferences → Caller: return prefixed content string
--- HTML rendering (build-sub-pages.js) ---
Caller → renderSkillDetail(skill, knownSkillIds): render skill detail page
renderSkillDetail → renderMarkdown(skill.body, { knownSkillIds, currentSkillId: skill.id }): render main body
renderMarkdown → createRenderer({ knownSkillIds, currentSkillId }): build custom marked.Renderer
createRenderer → renderer.heading({ tokens, depth }): override — slugify or extract {#custom-id}, emit <hN id='...'>
createRenderer → renderer.link({ href, title, tokens }): override — call resolveHref, emit <a> with rel/target attrs
createRenderer → renderer.code({ text, lang }): override — emit glass-terminal code-block-wrap HTML
createRenderer → Caller: return configured renderer
renderMarkdown → marked.parse(markdown, { renderer, gfm: true, breaks: false }): tokenise + render to HTML
marked → renderer.heading(...): invoked per heading token
marked → renderer.link(...): invoked per link token → calls resolveHref
resolveHref(href, { knownSkillIds, currentSkillId }): classify and rewrite href
resolveHref: https?:// or mailto: → { href, external: true }
resolveHref: starts '#' → in-page anchor, external: false
resolveHref: 'reference/foo.md' + currentSkillId → '#reference-foo', external: false
resolveHref: '/skill-id' in knownSkillIds → '/skills/skill-id', external: false
resolveHref: bare 'skill-id' in knownSkillIds → '/skills/skill-id', external: false
resolveHref: unknown → pass-through, external: false
renderMarkdown → Caller: return HTML string
renderSkillDetail → renderMarkdown(skill.editorial.body, { knownSkillIds, currentSkillId }): render optional editorial body
renderSkillDetail → skill.references.map(ref => renderMarkdown(ref.content, { knownSkillIds, currentSkillId })): render each reference file
renderSkillDetail → slugify(ref.name): generate stable anchor id for reference <details> block
renderSkillDetail → Caller: return assembled HTML body string
--- Tutorial rendering ---
Caller → renderTutorialDetail(tutorial, knownSkillIds)
renderTutorialDetail → renderMarkdown(tutorial.body, { knownSkillIds }): no currentSkillId (cross-page links only)

key_functions.renderMarkdown(markdown, opts): Entry point. Creates renderer then calls marked.parse(). opts: { knownSkillIds: Set<string>, currentSkillId: string|null }
key_functions.createRenderer({ knownSkillIds, currentS: Returns marked.Renderer with overrides for heading, link, code
key_functions.resolveHref(href, ctx): Private. Classifies href into 5 cases; returns { href: string, external: boolean }
key_functions.slugify(text): Exported. Lowercase + strip non-alphanum + spaces→dashes. Used for heading ids and reference slugs
key_functions.replacePlaceholders(content, provider, c: Replaces {{model}}, {{config_file}}, {{ask_instruction}}, {{command_prefix}}, {{available_commands}}; also swaps '/' prefix when provider cmdPrefix differs
key_functions.prefixSkillReferences(content, prefix, s: Rewrites /skillname and 'the X skill' prose references to use prefixed names
key_functions.buildSubPageData(rootDir): Orchestrates data loading; produces knownSkillIds Set consumed by all renderMarkdown calls

key_relationships: build-sub-pages.js imports renderMarkdown, slugify from render-markdown.js
transformers/factory.js and transformers/shared.js import replacePlaceholders, prefixSkillReferences from utils.js
createRenderer.renderer.link calls resolveHref (private, closure over knownSkillIds + currentSkillId)
resolveHref reads knownSkillIds Set to validate skill links
href_resolution_rules: https?:// or mailto: → external link (target=_blank rel=noopener)
important_notes: knownSkillIds (Set<string>) is built once by buildSubPageData and threaded into every renderMarkdown call. Skills not in the set render as plain pass-through hrefs. Heading renderer supports {#custom-id} suffix (kramdown/pandoc style). Code blocks use glass-terminal styling with a copy-button; no syntax highlighter in v1. Pre-processing (placeholder substitution + skill reference prefixing) happens BEFORE renderMarkdown — it operates on raw markdown strings, not HTML.
